name: offline-shop-pos
description: Offline-first LAN shop POS and management system with React, Node.js, Express, and SQLite.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace server && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace server && npm run typecheck --workspace frontend
